name: TLOH: Zemuria RPG
description:
The Legend of Heroes Kiseki Series

The Legend of Heroes: Trails of Zemuria
You get the idea Sandbox Zemuria
Just because I made dozens of book entries.
The Scenario is heavily refreshed for around a plot like Reverie's massive combination.
So world setting can be either Cold Steel, Pre- / Post-Reverie, Early or Late Horizon.
It's basically free play for stuff of the Septurian Calendar S.1204–1208.

Ages defaulted to 18+ / Adjusted.
Use a strong LLM with Proxy & your own prompt tuned for chatting.
(As per usual with high token / multi character bots.)
Reliant on some creativity on your end
with how you start or where you want to start.
Ported previous starts, Second is always free-form Build your own.
I wish you luck with however way your alternate world Zemuria goes.
You're welcome to use it for whatever creative scenario in mind this is just alternative
I thought of when making Erebonia due to how focused that setting was.
Lorebook weights should in Favor of Character and lore Second.
All of Zemuria is in your hands.(Well all except the East.)

Main character reference triggers: Rean Schwarzer, Alisa Reinford, Elliot Craig, Laura S.
